# Introduction
This project is designed for the HiSilicon Hi3863. 
## Current progress: 
1. Code from the newly created LVGL_HiSpark_GUI_Demo project has been ported.
2. The ILI9341 screen has been initially added using the SPI driver.
3. The LVGL code is put in the folder named /src/opensource/lvgl/ and the folder named porting is put in the same place.
4. The mainbody of the project is set in "/src/application/samples/my_project". In it ,you can see our program.
## Tips or Warnings:
1. The version of the lvgl we are using is lvgl v 8.3 not the initial version v9.3 which is provided by the Hispark SDK.
2. If you want to see our GUI , please visit this address: https://github.com/seanzjxgit/LVGL_HiSpark_GUI_Demo/
